title: Last 2 Motivational Monday Quotes of the Year
excerpt: So you might say I fell a little (or a lot) behind on blogging. Will try my best to keep you updated more regularly on the good ol' blog. I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally…
body:
So you might say I fell a little (or a lot) behind on blogging. Will try my best to keep you updated more regularly on the good ol' blog. 

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
